# CalmsToolkit

Go module (go 1.25) for media server monitoring and management.

## Binaries

- `media-streams` — Monitor Plex/Jellyfin streams
- `media-calendar` — Sonarr/Radarr calendar view
- `media-requests` — Overseerr/Jellyseerr interactive request manager
- `media-airtime`  — Fuzzy airtime lookup in Sonarr/Radarr
- `arr-feed`       — Sonarr/Radarr history event feed
- `calmstoolkit-setup` — Interactive config wizard

## Key packages

- `internal/config` — `ToolkitConfig` JSON schema at `~/.config/calmstoolkit/config.json`
- `internal/httputil` — `DoJSONWithRetry`, `DoXMLWithRetry`, configurable `MaxBodySize`
- `internal/cmdutil` — Shared `--version`, `--json`, `--no-color`, `--timeout` flags
- `internal/core` — `CommonConfig` embedded in every tool struct
- `internal/buildinfo` — Version injected via `-ldflags -X`
- `internal/slogx` — Structured logging via `log/slog`

## Build

```bash
make build
make test
```

See `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, and `docs/user/` for per-tool docs.
